sentence: 这款手环有传感功能，能检测心率。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn shǒuhuán yǒu chuángǎn gōngnéng, néng jiǎncè xīnlǜ.
english: This wristband has sensing capabilities and can detect heart rate.

sentence: 她在面板上擀开了饺子皮。
pinyin: Tā zài miànbǎn shàng gǎn kāi le jiǎozi pí.
english: She rolled out the dumpling wrappers on the kneading board.

meaning: 1. to defeat; 2. to inflict a defeat on sb
sentence: 主队在昨晚的比赛中大败对手。
pinyin: Zhǔduì zài zuówǎn de bǐsài zhōng dàbài duìshǒu.
english: The home team inflicted a crushing defeat on their opponents last night.

sentence: 她把自己的经历口述给记者听。
pinyin: Tā bǎ zìjǐ de jīnglì kǒushù gěi jìzhě tīng.
english: She recounted her experiences orally to the reporter.

sentence: 买卖象牙在很多国家是违法的。
pinyin: Mǎimài xiàngyá zài hěn duō guójiā shì wéifǎ de.
english: Trading ivory is illegal in many countries.
